heading: Assistance from States and public agencies; contracts and agreements
label: 178f Assistance from States and public agencies; contracts and agreements
text: The Secretaries are authorized to accept financial or other assistance from any State or public agency to aid in carrying out the provisions of this subchapter and to enter into contracts with respect to such assistance and to enter into agreements with any State or public agency for the purpose of demonstrating, transferring, or applying results of research or methods of economic development relating to native latex or to other critical agricultural materials.
notes: Amendments1984— inserted “or to other critical agricultural materials”.Pub. L. 98–284
amendments: Amendments1984— inserted “or to other critical agricultural materials”.Pub. L. 98–284
